summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Market Flux truthfulness and data wiring update. All backend APIs working correctly with rich stock data, price analysis, and AI grounded responses. Frontend properly displays live market snapshot, rich stock details with fundamentals/dividends, AI insight boxes, and data disclaimers.
passed_tests: Dashboard hero text 'Live Market Snapshot & AI-Driven Insights' with disclaimer
Stock Detail /stock/AAPL shows rich data panels (Key Stats, Fundamentals, Dividends & Growth)
Stock Detail displays 'As of' timestamps and data disclaimers
Significant Moves section showing >2% daily price movements
AI Insight box with input field and quick questions functional
Recent News section with actual article titles (non-empty)
GET /api/market/stock/AAPL/rich returns comprehensive fundamentals and dividends data
POST /api/ai/chat with ticker=JPM returns data-grounded responses with price references
AI Chatbot auto-detects ticker context when on /stock/JPM page
GET /api/news/ticker/JPM returns 10 articles with non-empty titles
All 13 backend API endpoints passing (100% success rate)
Market overview, movers, news feed, sentiment APIs working
User registration and AI rate limiting functioning correctly
